name: One Pan Mexican Quinoa
keywords: One Pan Mexican Quinoa, Vegetarian, Main, New
recipeIngredient: 1 15-ounce can black beans, drained and rinsed
1 cup corn kernels (frozen, canned or roasted)
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper (to taste)

recipeInstructions.text: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat. Add garlic and jalapeno, and cook, stirring frequently, until fragrant, about 1 minute.

Stir in quinoa, vegetable broth, beans, tomatoes, corn, chili powder and cumin; season with salt and pepper, to taste. Bring to a boil; cover, reduce heat and simmer until quinoa is cooked through, about 20 minutes. Stir in avocado, lime juice and cilantro.
